title: TrashSlot MandalasGUI Darkmode Compat
description: Make TrashSlot mod compatible with MandalasGUI Darkmode
body:
Makes https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot/versions compatible with https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode, also try my other projects:

1. https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-engineering-better-cloche

2. https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rependentsartifacts
